name: feature-study-workflow
description: Two learning-centered workflows for guided feature construction and verified study of existing codebases.

interface.shortDescription: Learn by building features or reconstructing existing codebases.
interface.longDescription: Two independent Codex skills: one guides user-led feature construction from requirements to retrospective; the other maps and teaches an existing codebase through verified runtime flows and an explicitly inferred pedagogical reconstruction order.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me choose between guided feature construction and verified study of an existing codebase.
